positive: Stylized, intricate celestial body mapping featuring abstract constellations and mythical celestial animals (like a stylized griffin or phoenix) composed of geometric line art and glowing bioluminescent neon accents. The central composition should be a swirling nebula vortex against a deep indigo midnight background. Use a strong contrast of bright turquoise, ethereal lavender, and brilliant gold. The style must resemble clean, high-contrast vector illustration and mandala art, optimized for screen printing and apparel transfer. Composition should be perfectly centered and highly repeatable, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong negative space. Cinematic volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution.
negative: blur, grain, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, artifact, low contrast, realistic photo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, muted colors
